title: hieracium wiesbaurianum subsp. hardangerense
intro: Hieracium wiesbaurianum subsp. hardangerense, also known as Hieracium hardangerense, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its bright yellow flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be beneficial in reducing inflammation and oxidative stress in the body. The leaves of the plant can be consumed as a tea or added to salads, and the flowers can be used to make a herbal preparation, such as an infusion or tincture, which can help to soothe digestive issues and promote overall health and well-being. Furthermore, Hieracium hardangerense has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
